title: glandulifolia ciliata
intro: Glandulifolia ciliata, also known as 'Prairie Brome', is a perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. The plant's medicinal properties lie in its ability to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and stomach pain, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Glandulifolia ciliata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
